description: Sent at the end of a data clearing (Fire) flow, capturing the overall outcome plus per-action timing, status, and errors for each data category cleared. The journey resolves to SUCCESS when clearing completes, or UNKNOWN when it is orphaned and resolved on a later launch.

form_factor.description: The form factor of the device

platform.description: The platform the app is running on

is_first_daily_occurrence.description: Whether this is the first occurrence of this event today. Only included when true.

name.description: The feature name for this event

status.description: The overall status of the operation

status_reason.description: Reason accompanying an UNKNOWN status: partial_data = an orphaned flow was completed on a later launch; timeout = the clearing did not complete within the timeout window.

included_options.description: Comma-separated list of specific options the user selected (tabs, data, aiChats).

source.description: Entry point that triggered the data clearing flow.

overall_latency_ms.description: Duration from start of the clearing attempt to its end state (in ms). Rounded to 10ms precision, capped at 10000ms (10 seconds).

clear_tabs_status.description: Final status of the clear_tabs action.

clear_tabs_latency_ms.description: Duration from start of the action to its end state (in ms). Rounded to 10ms precision, capped at 10000ms (10 seconds).

clear_tabs_error.description: Per-action error details for a single data clearing action. Mirrors the shared error block but is keyed by `description` rather than `error_description`.
